title: Catalyst Machine Config
description: Schema for ~/.config/catalyst/config.json — the Layer-2 machine-local config. Contains host-specific secrets, concurrency overrides, and webhook registration data. NEVER commit this file to version control.

enabled.description: When true, the execution-core daemon and phase agents emit OTEL traces and metrics to the configured endpoints.

prometheus.description: Prometheus remote-write or Pushgateway endpoint URI for metrics.

loki.description: Loki push API endpoint URI for log shipping.

catalyst.description: Machine-level Catalyst overrides. Fields here win over Layer-1 (.catalyst/config.json) on a per-field basis.

monitor.description: Monitor dashboard machine-level settings, primarily webhook registration data written by setup scripts.

github.description: GitHub webhook settings for the monitor.

smeeChannel.description: Smee.io proxy channel URI for receiving GitHub webhook events on a local machine.

repoColors.description: Maps repository full names (owner/repo) to CSS color strings for color-coding in the monitor dashboard. Relocated from Layer-1 catalyst.monitor.github.repoColors (CTL-1214) — a node-scoped operator display preference, not a cluster/repo invariant.

linear.description: Linear webhook registration map. Keys are Linear team keys; values are registration records written by setup-linear-webhook.sh.

additionalProperties.description: Webhook registration record for a single Linear team.

webhookId.description: Linear webhook UUID returned by the Linear API on registration.

smeeChannel.description: Smee.io proxy channel URI for this team's Linear webhook events.

registeredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this webhook was registered.

resourceTypes.description: Linear resource types this webhook is subscribed to (e.g. 'Issue', 'Comment').

linear.description: Linear app-actor credentials for the Catalyst agent identity.

agent.description: OAuth app-actor credentials. Never commit. Set up by setup-catalyst.sh.

clientSecret.description: Linear OAuth app client secret. Used to mint client_credentials tokens.

accessToken.description: Pre-minted app-actor access token (lin_oauth_*). May be stale; prefer minting fresh via clientId/clientSecret.

webhookSecret.description: HMAC webhook signing secret for the Linear app webhook.

botUserId.description: Linear user UUID of the app-actor. NOT USED in machine config (this field is for reference only; the operational botUserId is read from Layer 1 catalyst.monitor.linear.botUserId). Kept here for backwards compatibility / documentation of the app-actor identity.

orchestration.description: Orchestration overrides. Concurrency fields here win per-field over Layer-1 values. Use this to tune concurrency per machine without modifying committed config.

dispatchMode.description: Machine-level orchestration dispatch mode (relocated from Layer-1 catalyst.orchestration.dispatchMode, CTL-1214). 'phase-agents' runs one short-lived claude --bg job per pipeline phase; 'oneshot-legacy' runs a single long-lived claude -p job per ticket. Wins over the Layer-1 value when present; the shell reader falls back to 'oneshot-legacy' only when BOTH layers are absent, so this must be populated before Layer-1 dispatchMode is removed.

worktreeRefresh.description: Periodic background worktree-refresh settings (relocated from Layer-1 catalyst.orchestration.worktreeRefresh, CTL-1214). Keeps idle running worktrees rebased onto origin/<base> (CTL-707 L1).

enabled.description: When false, the periodic worktree-refresh timer is disabled.

intervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) the worktree-refresh timer runs.

quietSeconds.description: Minimum quiet period (in seconds) since the last worktree write before a refresh is attempted.

executionCore.description: Concurrency override values for the execution-core daemon scheduler. Each field independently wins over the corresponding Layer-1 value when present.

maxParallel.description: Maximum number of concurrently running phase-agent bg jobs on this machine. Wins over catalyst.orchestration.executionCore.maxParallel in Layer-1.

minParallel.description: Minimum concurrency floor on this machine. Wins over catalyst.orchestration.executionCore.minParallel in Layer-1.

maxParallelCeiling.description: Hard upper cap on maxParallel on this machine. Wins over catalyst.orchestration.executionCore.maxParallelCeiling in Layer-1.

targetParallel.description: Target steady-state concurrency used by the autotune controller on this machine. Wins over any Layer-1 value when present.

phaseAgents.description: Per-phase model routing overrides. Wins over catalyst.orchestration.phaseAgents.models in Layer-1. Use this to assign different models per machine (e.g. use opus on a powerful host, sonnet on a laptop).

models.description: Maps phase names to Claude model strings. Each entry independently overrides the corresponding Layer-1 value.

reconcile.description: Completion-declaration reconcile timer (CTL-1371). Drives Linear from EXPLICIT completion declarations (`catalyst-linear-reconcile declare`), never inferred from PR/merge state. Node-scoped; Layer-2 (~/.config/catalyst/config.json) wins per field.

mode.description: off = inert; notify = emit drift events but never write Linear; write = reconcile declared completions to Linear via the canonical primitive.

intervalSeconds.description: How often the drain timer ticks (seconds).

declarationsDir.description: Directory holding durable per-ticket completion markers (default ~/catalyst/completions; env CATALYST_COMPLETIONS_DIR).

feedback.description: Automatic feedback-filing settings (relocated from Layer-1 catalyst.feedback, CTL-1214). Node-scoped operator preference. Read Layer-2 first, Layer-1 fallback.

autoFile.description: When true, agents automatically file GitHub issues for feedback events without prompting.

githubRepo.description: GitHub repository full name (owner/repo) where feedback issues are filed.

labels.description: List of label strings applied to auto-filed feedback issues.

sweep.description: Orphan-worktree sweep thresholds (relocated from Layer-1 catalyst.sweep, CTL-1214). Node-scoped machine tuning consumed by orphan-sweep.sh. Read Layer-2 first, Layer-1 fallback, then code defaults (48/2/false/20).

idleHours.description: A worktree must be idle at least this many hours before the orphan sweep removes it.

intervalHours.description: How often (in hours) the orphan sweep runs.

salvagePush.description: When true, the sweep pushes any unpushed commits on a removed worktree's branch before deleting it.

maxRemovalsPerRun.description: Maximum number of worktrees removed per sweep run.

groq.description: Groq API credentials. Required if catalyst.filter.groqModel is configured and the broker's LLM filtering is enabled.

apiKey.description: Groq API key. Kept in machine config (not Layer-1) because it is a secret.
